filename: Lassi Paavolainen, Anniina Färkkilä vTMA meeting memo.docx

full_text:
Lassi Paavolainen, Anniina Färkkilä 5.12.2024

1) Virtual TMA collaboration - ideation, methods, objectives: what will be done and by whom

a. iCAN-DIP: Comparison of whole slides with physical TMAs. TME panel.

i. At the pixel level – patches – will the model learn enough from TMA vs whole slide?

ii. What associations can be made with other data, e.g., genomic data – to be excluded.

b. Virtual TMA idea

i. Based on cell segmentation, compare spatial correlation/statistics of WSI vs TMA

ii. 3 different sampling approaches

iii. tCycIF data

c. Task division

i. Lassi:

78 (oncosys-OVA) WSI stained with TME panel

Running the pixel based model on whole slides and vTMA a. Statistical comparison.

78 WSI Oncosys-OVA cell segmentation and quantification, and cell type annotations (Lassi, Teijo?)

ii. Anniina:

vTMA pipeline – optimization – other tCycIF data - Ms Thesis (Antti) a. Core annotations (2/25) b. Pathologist annotations for 78 WSI dataset (H&E) i. Guidelines for making TMA for iCAN (Lassi) – early year, by 2/25

Spatial cell-based statistics comparison

78 WSI cell-based analysis: spatial statistics comparison a. March-April 2025

Higher-plex cycif (partially) from the same samples: spatial statistics comparison

d. Next meeting: 2/25: Fernando, Antti, Naipunya, Lassi Gantugs, Teijo

2) Oncosys-OVA and iCAN-OVCA studies/collaborations and their scientific question setting

AF coordinates to avoid overlap

The vTMA project will be added to Oncosys-OVA

3) Upcoming grant applications – principles

4) Naipunya?

Meeting on May 26th 2025

Antti and Fernando showed presentations so all would be on the same page

Lassi team does have the images ready, they are working on cell type calling.

We consider the best would be to start with pixel level analysis based on pathologist annotations after Antti finds what is the best approach for vTMA sampling.

Antti said that in addition to parallelization he is using parallel programming.

We agreed that we could assess if there are batch effects between the iCAN samples for the pixel analysis approach and the cell type calling. Naipunya will share those asseement.

We will decide on how many articles we will get in the end, if one more into the biological prediction and another into more biological prediction of survival.
